pages.text: Knight orders of the taiga. Claimed via $(bold)/cabafaction claim knight$().$(br2)Unlocks 23 leader-only regalia recipes — Old Knight, Silver Knight, Dragonslayer, Spark of Dawn, and Fog Guard armor sets, plus the Dragonslayer Halberd, Fog Guard Sword, and Spark of Dawn Polearm.$(br2)The three signature weapons also exist on $(l:classes/blacksmith)Blacksmith$(/l) at standard difficulty. The Knight version is the ultra-hard regalia recipe.
